title: LebaneseMC
description: LebaneseMC Fabric modpack to enhance the client performance and player experience. Graphics enhancements and performance optimizations, recommended quality-of-life mods, awesome resource packs and beautiful shaders.
body: LebaneseMC [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net) modpack to enhance the client performance and player experience. Graphics enhancements and performance optimizations, recommended quality-of-life mods, awesome resource packs and beautiful shaders. [![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lebanesemc/versions) [![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lebanesemc) ## Overview This modpack is designed for the **LebaneseMC** server and community with optimization mods and quality-of-life features, improvements and enhancements. It creates a rich, beautiful and immersive visual and audio experience while being optimized and focused on high performance, accessibility and customization. ## Features - 🇱🇧 **LebaneseMC** server, custom main menu, loading screen and Discord rich presence - ⚙️ Graphics enhancements and performance optimizations - 🏃 Improved and smoother character and mob animations - 🏞️ Increased rendering and viewing distance - ✨ Enhanced and rich visual, status and particle effects - 🔊 Realistic, physics-based and ambient sound effects - 🎙️ Voice chat integration - 🎮 Controller and VR support - 🗺️ World map and minimap - 🎒 Inventory management and tooltip details - ❤️ Health bars and indicators - ➕ Dynamic and action-based crosshairs - 🧑 3D skin models, skin changer and player chat head icons - 🎥 Replays and live gameplay recording - 📷 Camera zoom and screenshot utilities - 🖥️ Colorful, smooth, dynamic and immersive HUDs and interfaces - 🎨 Vanilla-style smooth, minimalist, realistic, HD and PBR textures and customization resource packs - 🌄 Beautiful, visually stunning and realistic shaders - 🗂️ Resource and shader pack management ## Notes ### Resource packs and shader packs **Resource packs** are disabled by default. They can be enabled based on preference and must be added in the correct priority order to work and display correctly. Some resource packs may not look consistent or work well together depending on whether they were designed for default vanilla textures or for a specific texture pack. **Shader packs** are disabled by default. It is recommended to enable shaders for the best experience. However, please note that this may affect performance. ### Versions Versions use semantic versioning ([SemVer](https://semver.org)) and follow the **x.y.z** format: - **x** represents a new [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net) game drop version (YY.**D**.H). - **y** represents a new [Minecraft](https://minecraft.net) hotfix version (YY.D.**H**). - **z** represents a new change or update in mods, configuration, resource packs or shader packs. --- [![Chat with us on Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://lebanese.social/discord)
